name: create_team_share_stat equal-endpoint year_offset collapses to a single-year shift under a year split
description: Regression: an equal-endpoint year_offset ([-1,-1]) is a single-year shift, not a range. The from-plays team-share CTE must stay collapsed (project trg_share_from_plays / weighted_opp_rating_from_plays, not numerator/denominator or the un-reduced components) so the outer SELECT and the year-correlated join (year = player_years.year + -1) read a column that exists. Prior to the is_year_offset_range alignment the CTE switched to range-component mode on bare length>1 while the outer SELECT stayed collapsed, raising "column ... does not exist".
expected_query: with "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2021,2022,2023]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years), "te4494dd3c222089951b80b2cb21c05f0" as materialized (select "pg"."pid", ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.trg_pid = pg.pid THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0), 2) as trg_share_from_plays, "nfl_plays"."year" from "nfl_plays" inner join "player_gamelogs" as "pg" on "nfl_plays"."esbid" = "pg"."esbid" and "nfl_plays"."off" = "pg"."tm" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and ("trg_pid" is not null) and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2021, 2022) and "pg"."year" in (2021, 2022, 2023) group by "pg"."pid", "nfl_plays"."year"), "t2d8157ad1876806403a22ca749089a50" as materialized (select "pg"."pid", ROUND((1.5 * COUNT(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.trg_pid = pg.pid THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)) + (0.7 * SUM(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.trg_pid = pg.pid THEN nfl_plays.dot ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(nfl_plays.dot), 0)), 4) as weighted_opp_rating_from_plays, "nfl_plays"."year" from "nfl_plays" inner join "player_gamelogs" as "pg" on "nfl_plays"."esbid" = "pg"."esbid" and "nfl_plays"."off" = "pg"."tm" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and ("trg_pid" is not null) and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2021, 2022) and "pg"."year" in (2021, 2022, 2023) group by "pg"."pid", "nfl_plays"."year") select "player"."pid", player.first_name, player.last_name, "te4494dd3c222089951b80b2cb21c05f0"."trg_share_from_plays" AS "trg_share_from_plays_0", "t2d8157ad1876806403a22ca749089a50"."weighted_opp_rating_from_plays" AS "weighted_opp_rating_from_plays_0", "player_years"."year", "player"."primary_position" from "player" inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "te4494dd3c222089951b80b2cb21c05f0" on "te4494dd3c222089951b80b2cb21c05f0"."pid" = "player"."pid" and te4494dd3c222089951b80b2cb21c05f0.year = player_years.year + -1 left join "t2d8157ad1876806403a22ca749089a50" on "t2d8157ad1876806403a22ca749089a50"."pid" = "player"."pid" and t2d8157ad1876806403a22ca749089a50.year = player_years.year + -1 group by player.first_name, player.last_name, "te4494dd3c222089951b80b2cb21c05f0"."trg_share_from_plays", "t2d8157ad1876806403a22ca749089a50"."weighted_opp_rating_from_plays", "player_years"."year", "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500
